transactionID.description: Unique ID for this transmission. If the same document is sent again this number will change. From a CMS point of view this will be the dispatch Event ID (EV_ID)

submissionId.description: generated by Staging Prosecutors context and returned to the client.

compassCaseId.description: Unique Case ID as held on Compass

urn.description: URN could include suffixes for split and merged cases e.g. 01AB1234514, 01AB1234514/2. 01AB1234514 (M), 01AB1234514(M)/2

responseEmail.description: mail address that errors should be sent to

documents.description: Represents a document of any type
